title: 10 best herbal teas for boils
description: Lemon balm teas helps with boils because of its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The herb contains compounds like rosmarinic acid and terpenes, which help to reduce swelling and redness associated with boils. Additionally, lemon balm's antimicrobial properties can aid in fighting off the underlying infection causing the boil.
